NurOS

Independent Linux Distribution

Download

About

NurOS is an independent Linux distribution designed for high speed, security, and accessibility. Our goal is to create an open and powerful operating system for developers and everyday users.

Features

Independence

Not based on other distributions, providing full control over the system.

APG Format

Custom package format with fast installation and full dependency support.

Modern

Clean interface with intuitive system configuration tools.

Community

Active support through Telegram and GitHub.

System Requirements

CPU: ≥1 core, 2 recommended
RAM: ≥2 GB (4 GB recommended)
Disk Space: ≥15 GB free

Community

Join our community of developers and users.

GitHub Telegram
